title: On the (816,326,130) Difference-Set Problem in C_2 x C_408
lean_gate_reason: Not Lean-ready. Publication audit confirms that the target theorem is still paper-shaped, but the current packet only yields a conditional quotient-orbit obstruction: besides the repaired C_3 split, the route still depends on an unsupported claim that 7 is a proved multiplier for this exact row. Lean would only formalize a conditional argument with a live theorem gap, so formalization is later archival polish rather than a direct seal.
micro_paper_assessment: The target remains a good micro-paper row: one clean exact solve would still supply most of a short note, with no feeder ladder and a real title theorem. The current packet, however, fails the bounded publication audit because the strongest honest claim is only a conditional structural obstruction resting on an unsupported 7-multiplier input. This should be cooled rather than expanded.
strongest_honest_claim: The current artifact gives only a conditional structural obstruction: if a putative (816,326,130) difference set in C_2 x C_408 admitted the needed 7-multiplier input inducing the stated affine action on C_3 x C_17, then the quotient square-sum and orbit bookkeeping would contradict existence. This is stronger than a mere example, but it does not prove the intended nonexistence theorem.
paper_title_hint: On the (816,326,130) Difference-Set Problem in C_2 x C_408
candidate_theorem_slice: Target slice remains the exact Table 2 row in C_2 x C_408, but the strongest audited sub-slice is only a conditional quotient-orbit obstruction requiring a valid 7-multiplier theorem.
